programme.title: Buongiorno Benessere
programme.desc: Vira Carbone conduce il settimanale dedicato a medicina, salute e benessere, trattati con un linguaggio semplice e diretto.

programme.title: Linea Verde Illumina - Sport e Salute
programme.desc: In collaborazione con Sport e Salute, il programma dedicato all'attivita sportiva e ai corretti stili di vita. Un viaggio attraverso tante regioni italiane, con i leggendari personaggi dello sport italiano. La Lombardia, tra Lecco e Varese, e protagonista della dodicesima puntata. Francesco Gasparri sara in compagnia di Filippo Magnini, Stefano Pantano e Luana Pilia, alla scoperta dei progetti "Scuola Attiva Kids" e della "Giornata del Benessere", iniziative che promuovono l'attivita motoria, il benessere e i corretti stili di vita tra i piu giovani. Elisa Silvestrin sara con Andrea Lucchetta per parlare del progetto "Pause attive". Conduce Francesco Gasparri. Con la partecipazione di Elisa Silvestrin.

programme.title: Linea Verde Discovery
programme.desc: Federico Quaranta va alla scoperta della Sicilia occidentale, partendo da Marsala, famosa in tutto il mondo per l'omonimo vino, per le sue saline e il centro storico che offre un esempio particolarmente elegante di Barocco Siciliano. Ma anche per il suo caffe che vanta una tradizione centenaria. Da Marsala il viaggio prosegue verso l'interno alla scoperta della "nocellara del Belice" e del prezioso olio che se ne ricava. L'ultima tappa porta gli spettatori all'interno del Meraviglioso parco archeologico di Selinunte dove da circa un decennio si coltivano i grani antichi di Sicilia che erano praticamente scomparsi.

programme.title: Linea Verde Italia
programme.desc: "Linea Verde Italia" approda in Umbria per un appuntamento interamente dedicata alla lentezza, realizzata in collaborazione con la Regione Umbria. Monica Caradonna e Tinto attraversano il "cuore verde d'Italia" seguendo il Cammino dei Borghi Silenti, un itinerario che unisce comunita, paesaggi incontaminati e nuove opportunita di sviluppo territoriale. Si parte da Orvieto, con lo splendido duomo e la rupe che regala un panorama spettacolare, per poi spostarsi nei borghi di Tenaglie e Montecchio, in prossimita del Tevere, la cui natura e tutelata dall'Oasi Wwf del Lago di Alviano. Tappe anche a Baschi e Civitella del Lago, lungo un itinerario che mette in luce un'Umbria capace di trasformare la propria identita storica in risorsa per il futuro. Non solo borghi da cartolina, ma realta vive dove la ricerca scientifica e le nuove forme di economia circolare valorizzano l'ambiente, la cultura e il saper fare artigiano. La puntata accende infatti i riflettori sulle eccellenze che rendono unico questo territorio, come il CET-Centro Europeo di Toscolano, la scuola di musica fondata dal celebre autore Giulio Rapetti, in arte Mogol, autentico motore di sviluppo culturale e artistico nascosto tra le colline umbre, e il progetto Olea Mundi di Lugnano in Teverina, una sorta di arca di Noe che custodisce circa 400 varieta millenarie di ulivi del Mediterraneo. Spazio come sempre alla gastronomia del territorio, con i tradizionali umbrichelli fatti a mano, fino ai legumi e alle erbe spontanee per realizzare piatti legati alla stagionalita. Il percorso di Monica e Tinto restituisce cosi l'immagine di un'Umbria autentica, un mosaico di realta che sanno custodire le proprie radici trasformandole in valore contemporaneo.

programme.title: Tg1
programme.desc: Roma dai Fori Imperiali: Parata Militare in occasione della Festa della Repubblica. A cura del Tg1 e Rai Quirinale. Conducono Elisa Anzaldo e Nadia Zicoschi. Regia di Brunella Olivari.

programme.title: Linea Blu Discovery
programme.desc: La prima puntata parte da Miami, porta d'accesso al mar dei Caraibi e crocevia di culture, colori e suggestioni tropicali. Da qui, si salpa verso le Bahamas a bordo di una nave da crociera, che diventa l'osservatorio privilegiato sull'oceano e sul mondo delle grandi traversate. Prima tappa: Nassau, tra spiagge caraibiche e leggendarie storie di pirati che popolano l'immaginario di queste isole. Il viaggio prosegue verso Ocean Cay, un'isola sorprendente dove la natura sta lentamente tornando protagonista. Un luogo unico, trasformato in un laboratorio ambientale a cielo aperto, dove il mare, la sabbia e la barriera corallina raccontano una nuova possibilita di equilibrio tra uomo e ambiente. Ma questa puntata e anche un'immersione autentica nel cuore del Mar dei Caraibi. Livio Beshir e Giulia Capocchi esplorano fondali straordinari, vedendo una nursery per coralli e nuotando accanto alle razze, in un'esperienza intensa e spettacolare che mostra tutta la magia del mondo sottomarino. E come sempre, non manca il dietro le quinte della vita in mare: scopriamo come funziona una moderna nave da crociera, tra tecnologia, organizzazione e lavoro invisibile, entrando in contatto con chi il mare lo vive ogni giorno e continua a chiamarlo casa.

programme.title: Passaggio a Nord Ovest
programme.desc: In questa puntata visitiamo il Parco Nazionale di Etosha, il piu antico della Namibia. L'Inghilterra e una nazione che affonda le sue radici nella tradizione e qui da sempre si producono cappelli dalle forme e dimensioni piu disparate e atelier storici dove sono nati capi inconfondibili della moda maschile come lo smoking. Carri armati, scafandri, ponti mobili, robot umanoidi: queste invenzioni sono tutte ben presenti nella societa moderna. Eppure, cinque secoli fa un uomo le aveva gia immaginate: Leonardo da Vinci. Seguiamo Catherine Boisvert, una biologa evoluzionista e ricercatrice in Australia che studia un fenomeno che a prima vista non sembra affatto naturale, a cui e stato dato il nome di "schiuma del mare".

programme.title: A Sua immagine
programme.desc: Lorena Bianchetti racconta storie di coraggio, in un viaggio alla scoperta del senso della vita. Nella seconda parte commento liturgico al Vangelo del Mons. Dario Edorardo Viganó.

programme.title: Gli imperdibili
programme.desc: Backstage, anteprime, eventi e curiosita dentro lo schermo. E' il programma che offre informazione e approfondimento sulla programmazione dei canali che compongono il bouquet RAI. Regia di Francesco Pennacchia.

programme.title: Linea Med
programme.desc: Un viaggio contemporaneo che racconta il Mediterraneo come spazio vivo di scambio, contaminazione e identita condivisa, attraverso lo sguardo dell'Italia. Il programma esplora come il mare abbia influenzato la cultura, il turismo, la cucina, la musica e i modelli di sviluppo del nostro Paese, generando un dialogo costante tra tradizione e innovazione.

programme.title: Musica Mia
programme.desc: Lorella Boccia e Marco Conidi attraversano l'Italia da Nord a Sud per raccontare attraverso la musica, storie e tradizioni che si tramandano nel tempo e nel suono di ogni luogo.

programme.title: L'Eredita
programme.desc: Il game show di Rai Uno in cui 7 concorrenti si sfidano in diverse prove ad eliminazione, fino ad arrivare alla fase finale del gioco, l'imperdibile Ghigliottina. Qui, il campione della giornata, deve indovinare una parola attraverso le "parole indizio" per vincere.

programme.title: Tutti i sogni ancora in volo
programme.desc: Un grande show che vuole omaggiare il "varieta" di una volta. Un racconto fatto di storie, aneddoti personali e le piu belle canzoni di sempre. Ad accompagnare Massimo Ranieri in questo suo viaggio tra i grandi classici della canzone italiana una fan d'eccezione: Rocío Munoz Morales. Nel corso delle due puntate, Massimo Ranieri ospita grandi artisti della scena musicale italiana: gli amici di una vita, ma anche comici e grandi talenti della danza.

programme.title: Jet ski world series: jet ski world series_01
programme.desc: Hair-raising to say the least, the trusted steeds deliver up to a whopping 500 horsepower, going from 0-100km/hr. in under 3.8 seconds - putting the 'Jet' in Jet Ski. Wearing no protective body, grappling with the waves, and fighting it out with gravity, no wonder it is often said that these riders are some of the most courageous athletes in the world. Let us kick off this year's season with our first stop in Poland!

programme.title: World of freesport: world of freesport
programme.desc: The World of Freesports features the finest outdoor and extreme sports action this planet knows! programme.title: Xterra adventure - 2020: xterra adventure - 2020 #
programme.desc: XTERRA is the world's premier off-road multisport event. An extreme competition, the XTERRA format combines swimming with mountain biking and trail running. It has been described as one part triathlon, one part mountain bike race, and one part "survival of the fittest". The typical distances are a 1.5k swim, 30k mountain bike, and 10k trail run.

programme.title: Inside sailing 2019: inside sailing 2019 #
programme.desc: Inside Sailing contains highlights from top sailing and yachting events around the world. It is a documentary show which educates the audience about the secrets of sailing, presents several exciting sea-side locations and offers a flavor of yachting lifestyle.

programme.title: Inside sailing 2019: inside sailing 2019 #
programme.desc: Inside Sailing contains highlights from top sailing and yachting events around the world. It is a documentary show which educates the audience about the secrets of sailing, presents several exciting sea-side locations and offers a flavor of yachting lifestyle.

programme.title: Cape epic 2022: cape epic 2022 #
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world's premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through roughly 700km of unspoilt scenery and 15 000m of accumulated climbing, over some of the most magnificent mountain passes in Western Cape in South Africa. The Absa Cape Epic is the most televised mountain bike stage race in the world and the only eight-day mountain bike stage race classed as hors catégorie by the Union Cycliste Internationale (UCI). This official UCI status makes it a highlight on the professional racer's calendar. The Absa Cape Epic also attracts aspiring amateur riders wanting to test themselves against the best. It is a full-service race, meaning that everything is taken care of from the start - all riders need to think about is riding.

programme.title: Sports max: sports max #
programme.desc: Sports Max highlights the latest extreme and alternative sports from around the globe, including mountain biking, surfing, snowboarding, kiteboarding, skateboarding, rock climbing, kayaking, skydiving, freeskiing, freestyle motocross, BMX, extreme big mountain skiing & snowboarding, parkour and many more.

programme.title: Salomon gore - tex maxi race #1
programme.desc: More than just a trail-race the Maxi Race takes runners on an 85km journey around the unique landscape of Lake Annecy, France. Athletes choose the Ultra, Vertical-Race or Marathon, pushing themselves to develop mountain skills and face their own personal challenges. The Salomon Gore-Tex Maxi Race is one of the best and most demanding trail running events, staged in the stunning lake and mountain scenery of the Haute Savoie.

programme.title: Wild spirits h2o: wild spirits h2o #
programme.desc: Offering the very best extreme water action, featuring highlights from the most extreme and wettest sporting events in the world, including surfing, wakeboarding, kite and wind surfing. Wild Spirits H20 features rider profiles, interviews, highlights, and all things water based!

programme.title: Wild spirits h2o: wild spirits h2o #
programme.desc: Offering the very best extreme water action, featuring highlights from the most extreme and wettest sporting events in the world, including surfing, wakeboarding, kite and wind surfing. Wild Spirits H20 features rider profiles, interviews, highlights, and all things water based!

programme.title: Better than four: better than four #
programme.desc: Initially a bi-weekly (26×26') sports series with a difference, 'Better Than Four' brings viewers all the action from all things two-wheeled. As well as profiling past, present and future heroes of cycling, 'Better Than Four' includes news features and highlights from the very latest events. Each episode is also packed with tips and tricks to try at home, as well as reviews of the latest kit, equipment and cycling films. Changing gears from traditional cycling coverage, 'Better Than Four' takes viewers to new, exotic locations, from the volcano bike-ride in Bali to jungle biking around the Mayan temples of South America. Each episode will include up to 3 segments covering cycling and biking events from all over the world. With amazing footage and commentary from experienced cyclists, daredevil skills and awe-inspiring camerawork, this groundbreaking show is a must for cycling enthusiasts and novices alike.

programme.title: Sailing to tokyo 2019 - 2020: sailing to tokyo 2019 - 2020 #

programme.title: Speed catamarans gc32 2021: speed catamarans gc32 2021_
programme.desc: After making their debut in indomitable style in 2014, the unique flying catamarans literally "took off" on their first European Circuit in 2015. programme.title: Jet ski world series: jet ski world series_01
programme.desc: Hair-raising to say the least, the trusted steeds deliver up to a whopping 500 horsepower, going from 0-100km/hr. in under 3.8 seconds - putting the 'Jet' in Jet Ski. Wearing no protective body, grappling with the waves, and fighting it out with gravity, no wonder it is often said that these riders are some of the most courageous athletes in the world. Let us kick off this year's season with our first stop in Poland!

programme.title: World of freesport: world of freesport
programme.desc: The World of Freesports features the finest outdoor and extreme sports action this planet knows! From freeriding in the best powder faces and climbing to the highest peaks to the hot spots of surfing and mountain bike adventures, freesports can be found anywhere. Join us and be free!

programme.title: Gearing up 2019/2021: gearing up 2019/2021_
programme.desc: Welcome to GEARING UP, the TV Series that takes you around the globe following the hottest action from some of the world's most unique competitions. So, start your engines, tighten your seat belts, and get ready to feel the G-forces with some serious action!

programme.title: Sailing to tokyo 2019 - 2020: sailing to tokyo 2019 - 2020 #
programme.desc: This monthly magazine is dedicated to the story of Olympic Sailing, as the world's stars names and best rookies strive to compete on the world's greatest sports stage and claim their medals at the Olympic Games. To be a champion you need power, strength, skill, mental toughness, supreme fitness and strategy. Broadcast by over 20 broadcasters in more than 95 countries, Sailing to Tokyo follows the long journey and defining moments in athletes' careers as they aspire to make Olympic history.

programme.title: Outdoor sports show 2019: outdoor sports show 2019 #
programme.desc: Following a successful first run, The Outdoor Sports Show has returned on screens in early 2018, by showcasing a diverse array of outdoor sports destined to reach again millions of audiences globally. There are no limits to the content of the Outdoor Sports Show, which covers everything, from professional and recreational to the extreme and adventure sports. From marathon races to climbing, skiing to surfing, hiking to triathlon, sailing to cycling - human meets nature on a thrilling journey of performance.

programme.title: Freeride world tour: freeride world tour #
programme.desc: The Freeride World Tour is back in 2021 with stacked ski and snowboard fields set to thrill fans at three stops in Andorra, Austria and Switzerland.

programme.title: Golden trail series: golden trail series_02
programme.desc: The world of trail running is competitive, wild, and fast, but there is so much more! Immerse yourself in the Golden Trail World Series and get the backstage stories on the top teams, top runners, and best races in the world.

programme.title: Golden trail series: golden trail series_03
programme.desc: The world of trail running is competitive, wild, and fast, but there is so much more! Immerse yourself in the Golden Trail World Series and get the backstage stories on the top teams, top runners, and best races in the world.

programme.title: Xterra adventure - 2020: xterra adventure - 2020 #
programme.desc: XTERRA is the world's premier off-road multisport event. An extreme competition, the XTERRA format combines swimming with mountain biking and trail running. It has been described as one part triathlon, one part mountain bike race, and one part "survival of the fittest". The typical distances are a 1.5k swim, 30k mountain bike, and 10k trail run.

programme.title: Xterra adventure - 2020: xterra adventure - 2020 #

programme.title: Racing the world 2021: racing the world 2021_

programme.title: Sports max: sports max #
programme.desc: Sports Max highlights the latest extreme and alternative sports from around the globe, including mountain biking, surfing, snowboarding, kiteboarding, skateboarding, rock climbing, kayaking, skydiving, freeskiing, freestyle motocross, BMX, extreme big mountain skiing & snowboarding, parkour and many more.

programme.title: Salomon gore - tex maxi race #1
programme.desc: More than just a trail-race the Maxi Race takes runners on an 85km journey around the unique landscape of Lake Annecy, France. Athletes choose the Ultra, Vertical-Race or Marathon, pushing themselves to develop mountain skills and face their own personal challenges. The Salomon Gore-Tex Maxi Race is one of the best and most demanding trail running events, staged in the stunning lake and mountain scenery of the Haute Savoie.

programme.title: Inside sailing 2019: inside sailing 2019 #
programme.desc: Inside Sailing contains highlights from top sailing and yachting events around the world. It is a documentary show which educates the audience about the secrets of sailing, presents several exciting sea-side locations and offers a flavor of yachting lifestyle.

programme.title: Inside sailing 2019: inside sailing 2019 #
programme.desc: Inside Sailing contains highlights from top sailing and yachting events around the world. It is a documentary show which educates the audience about the secrets of sailing, presents several exciting sea-side locations and offers a flavor of yachting lifestyle.

programme.title: Cape epic 2022: cape epic 2022 #
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world's premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through roughly 700km of unspoilt scenery and 15 000m of accumulated climbing, over some of the most magnificent mountain passes in Western Cape in South Africa. The Absa Cape Epic is the most televised mountain bike stage race in the world and the only eight-day mountain bike stage race classed as hors catégorie by the Union Cycliste Internationale (UCI). This official UCI status makes it a highlight on the professional racer's calendar. The Absa Cape Epic also attracts aspiring amateur riders wanting to test themselves against the best. It is a full-service race, meaning that everything is taken care of from the start - all riders need to think about is riding.

programme.title: Speed catamarans gc32 2021: speed catamarans gc32 2021_
programme.desc: After making their debut in indomitable style in 2014, the unique flying catamarans literally "took off" on their first European Circuit in 2015. Building on the success of the America's Cup foiling catamarans, the GC32 takes the thrill of foiling to an extraordinary performance level in a fiercely fought five stage circuit raced across five iconic venues in Italy, Spain and France.

programme.title: Speed catamarans gc32 2021: speed catamarans gc32 2021_

programme.title: Kite master: kite master_
programme.desc: Kite Masters is the brand new series showcasing the latest news from the inspirational world of kite boarding - the action packed sport which continues to take the world by storm. Whether you are a kiteboarder - competitor or recreational, kiteboarding fan, interested observer or have ever wanted to give kiteboarding a go, then you are guaranteed to enjoy the Kite Masters series. There are a myriad of different disciplines in kiteboarding - racing to freestyle - for weekend warriors and the professional riders. Kite Masters checks in on them all and brings you the best round up of action from around the world.

programme.title: Better than four: better than four #
programme.desc: Initially a bi-weekly (26×26') sports series with a difference, 'Better Than Four' brings viewers all the action from all things two-wheeled. As well as profiling past, present and future heroes of cycling, 'Better Than Four' includes news features and highlights from the very latest events. Each episode is also packed with tips and tricks to try at home, as well as reviews of the latest kit, equipment and cycling films. Changing gears from traditional cycling coverage, 'Better Than Four' takes viewers to new, exotic locations, from the volcano bike-ride in Bali to jungle biking around the Mayan temples of South America. Each episode will include up to 3 segments covering cycling and biking events from all over the world. With amazing footage and commentary from experienced cyclists, daredevil skills and awe-inspiring camerawork, this groundbreaking show is a must for cycling enthusiasts and novices alike.

Athletes choose the Ultra, Vertical-Race or Marathon, pushing themselves to develop mountain skills and face their own personal challenges. The Salomon Gore-Tex Maxi Race is one of the best and most demanding trail running events, staged in the stunning lake and mountain scenery of the Haute Savoie.

programme.title: GP racing (2022): GP racing (2022) e
programme.desc: The show delves into the world of F1 technology where teams try to gain split second advantages over their rivals with cutting-edge engineering. GP Racing covers the colorful global spectacle that is the F1 World Championship.

programme.title: Wild spirits h2o: wild spirits h2o #
programme.desc: Offering the very best extreme water action, featuring highlights from the most extreme and wettest sporting events in the world, including surfing, wakeboarding, kite and wind surfing. Wild Spirits H20 features rider profiles, interviews, highlights, and all things water based!

programme.title: Better than four: better than four #
programme.desc: Initially a bi-weekly (26×26') sports series with a difference, 'Better Than Four' brings viewers all the action from all things two-wheeled. As well as profiling past, present and future heroes of cycling, 'Better Than Four' includes news features and highlights from the very latest events. Each episode is also packed with tips and tricks to try at home, as well as reviews of the latest kit, equipment and cycling films. Changing gears from traditional cycling coverage, 'Better Than Four' takes viewers to new, exotic locations, from the volcano bike-ride in Bali to jungle biking around the Mayan temples of South America. Each episode will include up to 3 segments covering cycling and biking events from all over the world. With amazing footage and commentary from experienced cyclists, daredevil skills and awe-inspiring camerawork, this groundbreaking show is a must for cycling enthusiasts and novices alike.

programme.title: Gearing up 2019/2021: gearing up 2019/2021_
programme.desc: Welcome to GEARING UP, the TV Series that takes you around the globe following the hottest action from some of the world's most unique competitions. High skill, passion for technology, impatience for innovation, and pure love for adrenaline, are combined at their best. So, start your engines, tighten your seat belts, and get ready to feel the G-forces with some serious action!
